audit_items.proof_trace: Both `ber_get_option` and `ber_set_option` guard all pointer dereferences with explicit NULL checks: `outvalue` is checked at L39 before any `*outvalue` deref, `invalue` at L131 before any `*invalue` deref, and `item` is dispatched at L45/L137 so `ber=item` is only dereferenced in the `item!=NULL` branch. No pointer is dereferenced before its NULL check on any code path in the file.
